title: 9 Tinctures for Women to Find Migraine Relief and Balance
description: Avena sativa tinctures, also known as oat straw extract, may help alleviate migraine symptoms due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The tincture contains beta-glucans, a type of soluble fiber that helps reduce inflammation and relax blood vessels, which can contribute to migraine pain. It also contains flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Moreover, Avena sativa tinctures contain a compound called avenanthramides, which have been shown t...
